records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple small C.O.s approaching from eleven o'clock!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple small C.O.s approaching from eleven o'clock!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple small C.O.s approaching from eleven o'clock!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't slow down! I'll handle them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't slow down! I'll handle them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't slow down! I'll handle them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're right on top of the target. Keep moving forward!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're right on top of the target. Keep moving forward!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're right on top of the target. Keep moving forward!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, isn't Captain fighting without the Virgo Sword?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, isn't Captain fighting without the Virgo Sword?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, isn't Captain fighting without the Virgo Sword?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She actually seems stronger than before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She actually seems stronger than before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She actually seems stronger than before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her movements were already clean before, but now she fights as though she's become one with her blade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her movements were already clean before, but now she fights as though she's become one with her blade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her movements were already clean before, but now she fights as though she's become one with her blade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your unity of attack and defense may mirror Dame Leonhardt's, but you sorely lack finesse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your unity of attack and defense may mirror Dame Leonhardt's, but you sorely lack finesse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your unity of attack and defense may mirror Dame Leonhardt's, but you sorely lack finesse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with that level of skill, you dare speak of chivalry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with that level of skill, you dare speak of chivalry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with that level of skill, you dare speak of chivalry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Large C.O. detected at one o'clock!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Large C.O. detected at one o'clock!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Large C.O. detected at one o'clock!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-where are they coming from...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-where are they coming from...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-where are they coming from...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, kids.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, kids.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, kids.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're on the brink of enlightenment, and yet the jesters prance about the stage in chaos.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're on the brink of enlightenment, and yet the jesters prance about the stage in chaos.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're on the brink of enlightenment, and yet the jesters prance about the stage in chaos.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the extent of what Dame Ascella can offer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is the extent of what Dame Ascella can offer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is the extent of what Dame Ascella can offer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir?! I didn't sense anything, so how...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir?! I didn't sense anything, so how...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir?! I didn't sense anything, so how...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Another clone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Another clone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Another clone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really so afraid of facing the Order alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really so afraid of facing the Order alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really so afraid of facing the Order alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah! Have you lost all sense of your place in this world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah! Have you lost all sense of your place in this world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah! Have you lost all sense of your place in this world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wretches like you getting in my way is what I find bothersome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wretches like you getting in my way is what I find bothersome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wretches like you getting in my way is what I find bothersome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You lack both value and strength, yet dare to disrupt my design with your petty resistance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You lack both value and strength, yet dare to disrupt my design with your petty resistance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You lack both value and strength, yet dare to disrupt my design with your petty resistance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing all the C.O.s clustered here means we're on the right track, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing all the C.O.s clustered here means we're on the right track, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing all the C.O.s clustered here means we're on the right track, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. If we want to advance, we'll have to cut through them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. If we want to advance, we'll have to cut through them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. If we want to advance, we'll have to cut through them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this many forces, he could've saved that child, Ascella.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this many forces, he could've saved that child, Ascella.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this many forces, he could've saved that child, Ascella.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in the end, he only cared for his own safety, not his allies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in the end, he only cared for his own safety, not his allies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in the end, he only cared for his own safety, not his allies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was a disposable pawn from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was a disposable pawn from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was a disposable pawn from the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to take on two knights of the previous generation without knowing her limits. Her defeat was inevitable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to take on two knights of the previous generation without knowing her limits. Her defeat was inevitable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to take on two knights of the previous generation without knowing her limits. Her defeat was inevitable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You and the former captain were once heroes to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You and the former captain were once heroes to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You and the former captain were once heroes to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to you? How did you change so completely?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to you? How did you change so completely?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to you? How did you change so completely?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there nothing left of your chivalry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there nothing left of your chivalry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there nothing left of your chivalry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your chivalry is nothing more than a doctrine crafted by others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your chivalry is nothing more than a doctrine crafted by others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your chivalry is nothing more than a doctrine crafted by others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I simply reshape those broken rules according to the world's true law.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I simply reshape those broken rules according to the world's true law.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I simply reshape those broken rules according to the world's true law.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you've seen what future awaits if we blindly cling to old traditions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you've seen what future awaits if we blindly cling to old traditions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you've seen what future awaits if we blindly cling to old traditions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you're right, I refuse to let things unfold the way you want, Carantisir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you're right, I refuse to let things unfold the way you want, Carantisir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you're right, I refuse to let things unfold the way you want, Carantisir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Anyone can talk big when they're not accountable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Anyone can talk big when they're not accountable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Anyone can talk big when they're not accountable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you really believe in your ideals, then prove them with your blade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you really believe in your ideals, then prove them with your blade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you really believe in your ideals, then prove them with your blade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-CSE. levels are spiking rapidly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-CSE. levels are spiking rapidly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-CSE. levels are spiking rapidly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption ray is reacting with the entities' energy! It can't be...!!

records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption ray is reacting with the entities' energy! It can't be...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Doppelganger syndrome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Doppelganger syndrome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Doppelganger syndrome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're using the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear to create a temporary sanctuary?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, we won't be able to avoid combat.
